SourceText: ParentText is easiest to use when you receive content as videos, images and text. However, your data bundle and bandwidth may not support videos. To save on data, you can opt to receive the same content with a smaller audio file or as text. How would you like to receive ParentText?
text: I-ParentText ilula kakhulu ukuyisebenzisa xa ufumana izifundo ngevidiyo, imifanekiso kunye nembalelwano. Noba kunjalo idatha kunye nomoya wonxibelelwano awungangazi xhasi ezi vidiyo. Ukonga idatha, Ungakhetha ukusifumana isifundo esifanayo nge odiyo encinci okanye imbalelwano. Ungathanda ukuyifumana njani i-ParentText yakho?

SourceText: Sorry, I don't understand what you mean.
Are you a WOMAN or MAN?
Is @fields.child_nickname a girl or a boy?
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: Is your child a girl or a boy?
text: Ingaba umntwana wakho yintombi okanye yinkwenkwe?

SourceText: Which province do you live in?
Please provide us with your child's first name.
text: Sicela usinike igama lomntwana wakho lokuqala.

SourceText: Please type "N" if you prefer not to answer.

✅Your personal information is safe and private. Your name and information will not be public, but your responses will be kept and used by researchers to learn how to support families like yours.  They plan to publish the results.
text: ✅Inkcukacha zakho zabucala zikhuselekile kwaye zisemfihlakalweni. Igama lakho nenkcukacha zakho azizovezwa ekuhleni, kodwa iimpendulo zakho zizogcinwa kwaye zisetyenziswe ngbaphandi ukufumana ukuba bangazinceda njani iitsapho ezifana nezakho. Bcwangcise ukuzikhupha iziphumo ekuhleni.

SourceText: ❌You can stop when you want. Just type {STOP}
Press YES if you agree with this. Type "EXIT" if you do not want to participate.
text: Cofa EWE ukuba uvumelana nalento. Cofa " PHUMA" ukuba awusafuni ukuba yinxalenye.

SourceText: That is wonderful, thank you so much!
Can you please confirm that you are 18 years old or older?
text: Unganceda uqinisekise ukuba uneminyaka eli-18 ubudala okanye ngaphezulu?

SourceText: Are you sure you do not want to get these messages? If you do not want to receive any more messages, please type NO. If you made a mistake, please press BACK and choose another option.
text: Ingaba uqinisekile ukuba awufuni ukuyifumana lemiyalezo? Ukuba awufuni ukufumana nayiphina imiyalezo, ndicela ucofe u HAYI. Ukuba wenze impazamo, ndicela ucofe u UMVA kaye ukhethe olunye ukhetho.

SourceText: If you ever return to participate in the programme, type "HELLO".
text: Ukuba uye waphinda wabuya wabayinxalenye kule nkqubo, cofa "MOLO".

SourceText: We hope to see you again soon, and we wish you a happy and peaceful day!
text: Sinethemba lokukubona msinyane kwakhona, kwaye sikunqwenelela  usuku olunolonwabo nolunoxolo!

SourceText: Sorry, ParentText is only for people over the age of 18. Do you confirm that you are under the age of 18?
text: Uxolo, iParentText yeyabantu abangaphezulu kwe-18 leminyaka ubudala kuphela. Uyaqinisekisa ukuba ungaphantsi kweminyaka eli-18 ubudala?

SourceText: If you want to experience ParentText, you can always share it with your parents or caregivers.
text: Ukuba ngaba ufuna imvakalelo yeParentText, ungayisebenzisa kunye nabazali okanye abagcini bakho.

SourceText: Here is a video that shows how to use ParentText.
text: Nantsi ividiyo ebonisa ukuba isetyenziswa njani i ParentText.

SourceText: When was @fields.child_nickname born? Enter their date of birth in the following format: DD/MM/YYYY. For example, if your child was born on May 19, 2010, enter 19/05/2010.
text: Kwakukunini u- @fields.child_nickname ezelwe? faka usuku lokuzalwa ulandele lendlela: DD/MM/YYYY. umzekelo, Ukuba umntwana wakho wazalwa ngo May 19, 2010.
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: When was your child born? Enter their date of birth in the following format: DD/MM/YYYY. For example, if your child was born on May 19, 2010, enter 19/05/2010.
text: Wazalwa nini umntwana wakho? faka usuku owazalwa ngalo ulandele lendlela: DD/MM/YYYY. Umzekelo, ukuba umntwana wakho wazalwa ngo May 19, 2010, faka 19/05/2010.

SourceText: Sorry, this date is invalid. Please provide your child's date of birth in the following format: DD/MM/YYYY. For example, if your child was born on May 19, 2010, enter 19/05/2010.
text: Uxolo, olu usuku alusebenzi. Ndicela unike usuku umntwana wakho wazalwa ngalo ulandele lendlela: DD/MM/YYYY. Umzekelo, ukuba umntwana wakho wazalwa ngo MAY 19,2010, FAKA 19/05/2010.

SourceText: The date you entered is in the future. Please provide your child's date of birth in the following format: DD/MM/YYYY. For example, if your child was born on May 19, 2010, enter 19/05/2010.
text: Olusuku ulifakileyo lukwi xesha elizayo. Ndicela ufake usuku/umhla owazalwa nagalo umntwana wakho ulandele lendlela: DD/MM/YYYY. Umzekelo, ukuba umntwana wakho wazalwa ngo May 19, 2010, faka 19/05/2010.

SourceText: Let's try again. Please provide your child's date of birth in the following format: DD/MM/YYYY. For example, if your child was born on May 19, 2010, enter 19/05/2010.
text: Masizame kwakhona. Ndicela unike usuku/umhla umntwana wakho owazalwa ngalo ulandele lendlela: DD/MM/YYYY. Umzekelo, ukuba umntwana wakho wazalwa ngo May 19, 2010, faka 19/05/2010.

SourceText: @fields.child_nickname is @(round_down(datetime_diff(results.date,now(),"M")/12)) years old. Is that correct?
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: Your child is @(round_down(datetime_diff(results.date,now(),"M")/12)) years old. Is that correct?
text: Umntwana wakho u @(round_down(datetime_diff(results.date,now(),"M")/12)) ubudala. Ingaba inyanisile?
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: @fields.child_nickname is @(round_down(datetime_diff(results.date,now(),"M")/12)) years old.  Is that correct?
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: Your teen is @(round_down(datetime_diff(results.date,now(),"M")/12)) years old.  Is that correct?
text: Umntwana wakho u @(round_down(datetime_diff(results.date,now(),"M")/12)) ubudala. Ingaba inyanisile?
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: According to the date you provided, @fields.child_nickname would be @(round_down(datetime_diff(results.date,now(),"M")/12)) years old. ParentText is only for children aged 2-17. Please enter a valid date for your child's birth in the following format: DD/MM/YYYY. For example, if your child was born on May 19, 2010, enter 19/05/2010.
text: Ngoko mhla owunikezeleyo, @field.child_nickname uyakube @(round_down(datetime_diff(results.date,now(),"M")/12)) ubudala. IParent Text ingabantwana aba minyaka iyi 2-17 kuphela. Nceda faka umhla osebenzayo womntwana wakho wokuzalwa ulandele lendlela: DD/MM/YYYY. Umzekelo, ukuba umntwana wakho wazalwa ngo May19, 2010, faka 19/05/2010.
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: According to the date you provided, your child would be @(round_down(datetime_diff(results.date,now(),"M")/12)) years old. ParentText is only for children aged 2-17. Please enter a valid date for your child's birth in the following format: DD/MM/YYYY. For example, if your child was born on May 19, 2010, enter 19/05/2010.
text: Ngoko mhla owunikezeleyo, @field.child_nickname uyakube @(round_down(datetime_diff(results.date,now(),"M")/12)) ubudala. IParent Text ingabantwana aba minyaka iyi 2-17 kuphela. Nceda faka umhla osebenzayo womntwana wakho wokuzalwa ulandele lendlela: DD/MM/YYYY. Umzekelo, ukuba umntwana wakho wazalwa ngo May19, 2010, faka 19/05/2010.
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: Welcome to ParentText! This chatbot has been designed with and for parents just like you. We hope you find it useful!
text: Wamkelekile kwi-ParentText! Eli qonga lokuncokola lenzelwe abazali abanje ngawe. Siyathemba uyakuyifumana iluncedo!

SourceText: ParentText will help you with all of the children in your life, but in this programme, we are focusing on just one child at a time.
text: I ParentText izakunceda ngabo bonke abantwana bakho kubomi bakho, kodwa kulenkqubo, sijongana nomntwan omnye ngexesha.

SourceText: Would you like to go back to the previous messages?
That's okay. Type {HELP} at any time if you would like the details of emergency services or other hotlines.
text: Kulungile. Chwetheza  {HELP} nangeliphina ixesha xana ufuna inkcukacha ngenkonzo zongxamiseko okanye umnxeba.

SourceText: Here are the contact details of your local emergency services:
text: Nazi iinkcukacha zoqhagamshelwano zeenkonzo zakho zengxakeko zengingqi:

SourceText: Type {HELP} at any time if you would like the details of emergency services or other hotlines. Remember everything you say will be completely private!
text: Chwetheza {HELP} nangeliphina ixesha ukuba ungathanda ukufumana iinkcukacha zenkonzo zongxamiseko okanye inombolo zomnxeba!

SourceText: If you ever feel like talking privately to a trained professional, you can call:
text: Ukuba ngaba unemvakalelo yokuthetha bucala negcisa eliqeqeshiweyo, ungatsalela:

SourceText: Here are the contact details of your local medical services:
text: Nazi iinkcukacha zoqhagamshelwano zeenkonzo zakho zonyango zengingqi:

SourceText: Are you currently facing an emergency?
Do you need some support with an emotional issue?
text: Ingaba ufuna inkxaso ethile ngomba wasemoyeni?

SourceText: Are you currently experiencing a health issue?
Are you experiencing an unsafe situation?
Do you need some urgent help?
I might know some resources that can help. Would you like information for:
text: Ndingazazi ezinye zezixhobo ezinokuba luncedo. Ungaluthanda ulwazi lwe:

SourceText: Please look after yourself! Your local clinic can help you with all health issues. If you need more support, here are some free helplines:
text: Ndicela uzinakekele! Iklinikhi yakho yasekuhlaleni ingakunceda ngazo zonke iingxaki zakho zempilo. Ukuba udinga inkxaso eyongezelelweyo, nazi ezinye iifowuni zoncedo lwasimahla:

SourceText: Seeing and experiencing violence can be a scary and confusing time. There are people who can help you and your child through this!
text: Ukubona kunye nokuba namava obundlobongela kunokuba lixesha elothusayo kwaye nelibhidayo. Kukho abantu abanokunceda wena kunye nomntwana wakho kule nto!

SourceText: Feeling sad or stressed, or your child's behaviour is difficult? These places can help you:
text: Uziva ulusizi okanye uxinzelelekile, okanye ukuziphatha komntwana wakho kunzima? Ezi ndawo zingakunceda:

SourceText: Family life is difficult! Did you know the social workers at your local Department of Social Development can help with parenting skills, fatherhood, teenage pregnancy, and family and relationship counselling? If you don't have a DSD office nearby, this support will be offered by NGOs in your area:
text: Ubomi bosapho bunzima! Ubusazi ukuba oonontlalontle kwiSebe lezoPhuhliso loLuntu kwingingqi yakho bangakuncedisa ngezakhono zobuzali, ubutata, ukukhulelwa kolutsha, kunye nokukucebisa kwezobudlelwane? Ukuba ayikho i-ofisi yeSebe lezoPhuhliso loLuntu ekufutshane, lenkxaso iyakunikezwa zii NGOs kwindawo ohlala kuyo:

SourceText: So much of our energy goes to helping the person struggling with substance abuse. While this is important, you and the rest of the family need support too! Find support for everyone below:
text: Amandla ethu amaninzi aya ekuncedeni umntu onengxaki nokuxhaphaza iziyobisi. Nangona oku kubalulekile, wena kunye nosapho lwakho luphela niyakudinga ukuxhaswa nani! Fumana inkxaso yawo wonke umntu ngezantsi:

SourceText: Legal and SASSA issues can be stressful and confusing! There might be more support than you realise at the organisations below:
text: Eyomthetho kunye no-SASSA imiba inganoxinzelelo kwaye iyabhida! Kungakhona inkxaso eyongezelelweyo kunokuba usazi kulemibutho ingezantsi:

SourceText: Understanding sexual and gender development can be confusing and difficult to talk about. We are all unique! Here is some support and guidance:
text: Ukuqonda ukukhula ngokwezesondo kunye nesini kunokubhida kwaye kubenzima ukuthetha ngako. Sonke sahlukile! Nazi ezinye zenkxaso kunye nesikhokhelo:

SourceText: School is where your child spends most of their time. Making sure that they are in school, and happy and supported is so important. If you're struggling with any school issues, here is some help:
text: Esikolweni kulapho umntwana wakho achitha khona ixesha lakhe elininzi. Ukuqinisekisa ukuba usesikolweni, kwaye wonwabile kwaye uyaxhaswa kubalulekile kakhulu. Ukuba usokoliswa nayiphi na imiba yesikolo, nalu uncedo:

SourceText: What would you like to do?
We hope this was helpful! You can access this information at any time by typing {HELP}.
text: Siyathemba lento ibeluncedo kakhulu! Ungakwazi ukuzifumana ezinkcukacha nangeliphina ixesha ngokucofa {HELP}.

SourceText: Please type {MENU} to access resources and review completed modules, {PLAY} to receive a playful activity you can complete with your child, or {HELP} to access local support resources for a crisis.
text: Ndicela ucofe {MENU} ukufumana izixhobo kunye nokuphononongo ukugqibezela i modyuli, {PLAY} ukufumana umdlalo odlalisayo ongawenza nomntwana wakho, okanye {HELP} ukufumana indawo zezixhobo zokuxhasa kwi ngxakeko.

SourceText: You have not given consent to participate in this programme. Would you like to participate?
text: Awuyinikanga imvume yokuthabatha inxaxheba kule nkqubo. Ungathanda ukuthabatha inxaxheba?

SourceText: If you ever decide to participate in the programme, type HELLO.
text: Ukuba uye wagqiba ukuthatha inxaxheba kule nkqubo, chwetheza  MOLO.

SourceText: Parenting is hard. ParentText may help. Would you like to continue your progress?
text: Ubuzali bunzima. i ParentText inganceda. Ungathanda ukuqhubekeka nenkqubela yakho?

SourceText: That's okay. If you ever decide to come back, type HELLO.
text: Kulungile. Ukuba uye wagqiba ukubuyela umva, chwetheza MOLO.

SourceText: You are already part of ParentText!
Staying in ParentText helps you and your child. Are you sure you want to exit the programme?
text: Ukuhlala kwi ParentText kunganceda wena kunye nomntwana wakho. Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukuphuma kule nkqubo?

SourceText: If you do not want to receive any more messages, please type "EXIT".
text: Ukuba awufuni ukufumana nayiphina na imiyalezo, Sicela ucofa "PHUMA".

SourceText: If you made a mistake, please type "BACK".
text: Ukuba uthe wenza impazamo, sicela cofa "UMVA".

SourceText: Thank you for participating. If you want to return to the programme, type HELLO.
text: Enkosi ngokuthatha inxaxheba. Ukuba ufuna ukubuyela kule nkqubo, cofa MOLO.

SourceText: We hope to see you again soon!
This feature will be available once you have completed registration. It won’t take long. Please continue your progress!
text: Eli phawu lizakufumaneka kanye xa ugqibile ubhaliso. Ayizothatha ixesha elide. Sicela uqhubeke nekqubela!

SourceText: The menu will be available once you have completed registration. It won’t take long. Please continue your progress!
text: Olu luhlu luza kufumaneka kanye xa ugqibile ubhaliso. Ayizothatha xesha lide. Sicela uqhubeke nenkqubela phambili yakho yakho!

SourceText: In this course, you will complete @fields.c_n_mod lessons. You will receive a new lesson each day. Your first lesson is @results.name.
text: Kwesisifundo, uzakugqibezela @fields.c_n_mod yezifundo. Uzakufumana isifundo esitsha ngosuku ngaliye. Isifundo sakho sokuqala ku @results.name.
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: You have completed @fields.c_n_mod_compl out of @fields.c_n_mod lessons in this course. Today's lesson is @results.name.
text: Uye wagqiba i @fields.c_n_mod_compl ngaohandle kwe @fields.c_n_mod yesifundo kwesisifundo. Isifundo sakho sokuqala ku @results.name.
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: Let’s get started. Press NEXT to begin.
Well done. You're ready to start the programme.
There are no new courses available.
You only have the following course to start

note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: Would you like to begin this course?
Which new course would you like to start?
text: Sesiphi isifundo esitsha ongathanda ukuqala ngaso?

note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: You do not have have a current course.
You only have the following course started
Which unfinished course would you like to complete?
You only have the following course to complete
Great! Which unfinished course would you like to complete?
text: Kwakuhle! Sesiphi isifundo ongasigqibanga ongathanda ukusigibezela?

SourceText: You only have the following lesson to complete:
Which lesson would you like to complete?
You haven't started to work on a course yet.
You have only started the course
Would you like support on it?
That's okay. You can access more information at any time in the Main Menu. Just type {MENU}.
text: Kulungile. Ungazifumana iinkcukacha ezongezelelweyo nangeliphina ixesha kuluhlu olungaphambili. Cofa {MENU}.

SourceText: You haven't completed a lesson yet.
Which course do you want to review?

note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated. @results.count is a number (counter for list)

SourceText: You haven't completed any of the lessons in this course.
You have only completed the following lesson:
Would you like to review it?
That's okay. You can come back here at any time to review it.
text: Kulungile. Ungabuyela kwakhona nangeliphina ixesha usiphonononge.

SourceText: You have completed @fields.n_s_modules_compl lessons within this course. Which lesson do you want to review?
text: Uye wagqiba @fields.n_s_modules_compl izifundo phakathi kwiesisifundo. Sesiphi isifundo ofuna ukusiphonononga?
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.
Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated. @results.count is a number (counter for list)

SourceText: You have seen all the courses
It’s time to pick a new course! You have completed @fields.n_goals_completed of @fields.n_goals_prog courses. Which course would you like to work on next?
text: Lixesha lokukhetha isifundo esitsha! Usigqibile @fields.n_goals_completed se @fields.n_goals_prog zifundo. Sesiphi isifundo ongathanda ukusebenza kuso kokulandelayo?
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: You have completed @fields.n_goals_completed of @fields.n_goals_prog courses. Which course would you like to work on next?
text: Ugqibe @fields.n_goals_completed ye @fields.n_goals_prog zifundo. Sesiphi isifundo ongathanda ukusebenza kuso kokulandelayo?
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: What would you like to do next?
What kind of activity do you want to try with your teen?
text: Ngowuphi umdlalo ofuna ukuwuzama kunye nomntwana wakho?

SourceText: What kind of activity do you want to try with your baby?
text: Ngowuphi umdlalo ofuna ukuwuzama nosana lwakho?

SourceText: What kind of activity do you want to try with your child?
text: Ngowuphi umdlalo ofuna ukuwuzama kunye nomntwana wakho?

SourceText: Do you want to begin now or tomorrow?
It takes only 5 days to complete this course and earn your parenting certificate.
text: Ithatha iintsuku ezi 5 kuphela ukugqibezela esisifundo kwaye ufumane isatifikethi sakho sobuzali.

SourceText: 🎉You did it!🎉 You have completed the course @results.name. Here's your course certificate. Congratulations!
text: 🎉Uyenzile!🎉 Usigqibile isifundo @results.name. Nasi isatifiketi sakho. Siyavuyisana nawe!
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: Remember, you can always return to ParentText and get extra support or review this information. Just type {MENU}.
text: Khumbula, ungakwazi ukuphinda ubuyele kwi Parent Text kwaye ufumane inkxaso eyongezelelwe okanye ungasuke ucofe {MENU}.

SourceText: ParentText has begun. You are just 5 days away from earning your parenting certificate. Are you ready to complete your registration and get started?
text: I-ParentText seyiqalile. Unentsuku ezi-5 ukuyofika ekufumaneni isatifikethi sakho sobuzali. Ukulungele ukugqiba ubhaliso kwaye ube sewuqalisa?

SourceText: Press a number on your keypad:
You’re off track! Do you want to complete your previous unifinished lesson or start a new lesson?
text: Uphumile endleleni! Ingaba uyafuna ukugqibezela isifundo sakho sangaphambili esingagqitywanga okanye uqale isifundo esitsha?

SourceText: Do you want to catch up and proceed to the next lesson?
text: Ingaba uyafuna ukuqhubekeka okanye uqhubeke nesifundo esilandelayo?

SourceText: You're almost finished with this course! You only have 1 unfinished lesson. What would you like to do?
text: Sekukufutshane ugqibe ngesisifundo! Unesifundo esi 1 kuphela ongasigqibanga. Ungathanda ukwenza ntoni?

SourceText: 1. Finish this lesson and earn my course certificate
text: 1. Gqibezela esi sifundo kwaye ufumane isatifikethi sesifundo sam

SourceText: You're almost finished with this course! You have @fields.c_n_mod_started unfinished lessons. What would you like to do?
text: Sekukufuphi ugqibezele esi sifundo sakho! Une @fields.c_n_mod_started kwi zifundo ezingagqitywanga. Ungathanda ukwenza ntoni?
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: 1. Complete unfinished lessons to earn my course certificate
text: 1. Gqibezela izifundo ezingagqitywanga ukufumana isatifikethi sam sesifundo

SourceText: It's time to get started on ParentText. Are you ready?
Press a number on your keypad:
I've got another lesson ready for you! Are you ready?
These messages don’t seem to be working. When you are ready to keep going, press 1.
text: Lemiyalezo ayibonakalisi kusebenza. Ukuba ukulungele ukuqhubekeka, cofa 1.

SourceText: You have not completed a course yet.
You have completed the following course:

note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: You have completed the following courses:
There are no other courses to complete.
You have the following courses still available:
You have not begun the following courses:
You are on track to complete the entire ParentText programme! There are no new courses to start!
text: Usendleleni ukugqibezela inkqubo yobuzali yonke ye Parent Text! Azikho ezinye izifundo zokuqalisa!

SourceText: You have the following course available:
You have the following courses available:
We hope this was helpful! You can access the Main Menu at any time by typing {MENU}.
text: Siyathemba ukuba lento ibeluncedo olukhulu! Ungayifumana kwi Menyu nangeliphina ixesha ngokucofa {MENU}.

SourceText: Your relationship status has been updated. You've unlocked a new course: @results.name.
text: Ubume bobudlelwane wakho sebuhlaziyiweyo. Ungavula isifundo esitsha.
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: To invite someone to join, share this link!
text: Ukumema omnye umntu ajoyine, yabelana nge khonkco!

SourceText: You have reached the end of this lesson! 🎉
What do you want to do next?
text: Yintoni enye into ofuna ukuyenza elandelayo?

SourceText: That's okay. You can access more information at any time in the Main Menu.
text: Kulungile. Ungazifumana iinkcukacha ezongezelelweyo nangeliphina ixesha kuluhlu olungaphambili.

SourceText: 🎉You did it! Congratulations!🎉 You have completed all the available courses. Well done!
text: 🎉 Usebenzile! Sivuyisana nawe🎉 Uzigqibile zonke izifundo ezikhoyo. Wenze kakuhle!

SourceText: You have completed @fields.c_n_mod_compl out of @fields.c_n_mod lessons.
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.
Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: You are currently working on the course @results.name.
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.
